name: Aarav Kulkarni
message: With 9 years in non-tech roles, shifting to Data Engineering seemed unrealistic. NxtGen Academy's Cloud and SQL lessons simplified everything. Resume and portfolio guidance helped me get shortlisted. I'm now working at Airbnb India Tech.

name: Meera Sharma
message: I had basic development experience but wanted a data-focused role. NxtGen Academy's ETL and orchestration tasks helped me understand DE clearly. Project reviews shaped my thinking. I cracked a DE role at Uber India Tech.

name: Vikram Joshi
message: My background was sales admin, not technical, but NxtGen Academy's SQL and dashboard training changed everything. Resume and interview support made a big difference. I secured a Business Analyst role at Cognizant.

name: Priya Nair
message: Switching from a bio-science role felt risky, but NxtGen Academy's weekly dataset tasks helped me understand analytics well. Mock interview sets prepared me for real rounds. I joined Infosys BPM's data insights team.

name: Rohan Banerjee
message: I spent 6 years in accounts but wanted to work in analytics. NxtGen Academy's KPI-driven project work helped me understand business patterns. Interview guidance gave me clarity to explain my projects. I landed an analyst role at Deloitte India.

name: Sneha Patil
message: With 3.5 years in testing, I wanted a shift. NxtGen Academy's dashboards and SQL training simplified analytics for me. Mock rounds and portfolio revisions helped me secure an offer at EXL Analytics.

name: Karthik Reddy
message: I had no marketing background, but the clarity I got at NxtGen Academy while learning SEO, ads, and analytics boosted my confidence. Resume restructuring helped me. I cracked a role at WATConsult.

name: Ananya Mehra
message: As a fresher, I lacked hands-on understanding, but NxtGen Academy's practical assignments helped me grasp campaign structures quickly. The portfolio review helped me stand out. I joined Gozoop as a junior digital marketer.

name: Harsh Tiwari
message: As a fresher, I only knew basic posting, but learning SEO, paid ads, and analytics step-by-step at NxtGen Academy gave me real clarity. Working on campaign simulations built my confidence. I cracked my first job at Performics India.

name: Divya Kapoor
message: Switching from support seemed impossible until I started hands-on security labs at NxtGen Academy. SIEM tools and alert investigation tasks gave me confidence. I joined Tenable India after a successful second interview.

name: Arjun Saxena
message: With 3 years in NOC, I wanted a new challenge. NxtGen Academy's hands-on SOC environments helped me understand real threats. Through interview prep, I secured a role at SecureWorks.

name: Ishita Ghosh
message: After almost 5 years as a SysAdmin, I wanted to shift into SOC roles. NxtGen Academy's SIEM, threat intelligence, and incident response training gave me clarity. The real attack simulations helped me show practical skills in interviews. I secured a SOC Analyst position at Mandiant.

name: Sameer Deshmukh
role: Ex-Team Lead at FinAxis Global (11 yrs)
message: With 11 years in finance, I wanted to enter ML. NxtGen Academy's clear explanations and project-based learning helped me build confidence. I landed a role at Goldman Sachs.

name: Tanvi Iyer
role: Ex-Data Engineer at CloudMatrix Solutions (9 yrs)
message: With 9 years in data engineering, I wanted ML roles. NxtGen Academy's clear explanations, ML pipelines, and real projects helped me grow fast. I joined Bloomberg through a hiring network shared with me.

name: Nikhil Pandey
message: After 7 years in development, I wanted to shift into ML. NxtGen Academy's structured ML guidance, real projects, and deployment clarity helped me transition. With interview prep and portfolio upgrades, I secured an ML Engineer role at LinkedIn India.

name: Riya Srivastava
message: The hands-on assignments and weekly evaluations at NxtGen Academy kept me consistent. My end-to-end analytics project on churn prediction impressed the CRED panel. This program truly accelerates career transitions.

name: Gaurav Patel
message: Moving to business analytics from operations wasn't easy. But NxtGen Academy clarified everything — from SQL to business problem solving. My supply-chain optimization capstone became a major talking point in BigBasket's interview.

name: Siddharth Malhotra
message: I never imagined transitioning from a service-based workflow to a high-scale product company after 12 years. NxtGen Academy's Full Stack program rebuilt my fundamentals, strengthened my system design skills, and the placement team guided me throughout. Cracking Walmart Global Tech felt impossible before, but NxtGen Academy made it achievable.

name: Kavya Rao
message: I always wanted to work in a product company but didn't know how to compete. NxtGen Academy's portfolio projects and mock assessments boosted my confidence. Joining Razorpay as a full stack developer completely accelerated my career.

name: Aditya Chauhan
message: Moving from Wipro to PhonePe was a huge leap for me. NxtGen Academy's hands-on training in Node.js, React, and system design gave me an edge. The placement support was very active — multiple product companies lined up. I cracked PhonePe in two rounds thanks to the mock interviews.

name: Pallavi Hegde
message: With more than a decade in a service company, I felt stuck in repetitive tasks. NxtGen Academy's industry-level projects and mock interviews helped me target real product companies. I'm thrilled to join PayPal, something I thought was out of reach.

name: Rahul Pillai
message: I wanted to shift from QA to development. NxtGen Academy's MERN stack, system design basics, and guided projects helped me understand real workflows. Interview preparation made a huge difference. I joined Amazon Development Center through a referral connection.

name: Aditi Verma
message: As an economics graduate, I wanted a business-focused analytics role. NxtGen Academy's problem-solving sessions and real datasets helped me think analytically. Mock interviews boosted my confidence, and I landed a role at KPMG.

name: Manish Arora
role: Placed at McKinsey & Company (Business Insights Division)
message: I struggled with storytelling earlier, but NxtGen Academy's dashboard-building and business case practice made everything clear. The resume suggestions boosted my profile. I cracked two rounds and got placed at McKinsey's insights team.
